title: Parlei Agent Response Envelope
description: The standard inter-agent response message format for the Parlei parliament.

to.description: The agent this response is addressed to (usually Speak-er).

request_id.description: Must match the request_id of the originating request.

items.description: One response item per request item. All request item IDs must be accounted for.

id.description: Must match the corresponding request item ID.

notes.description: Explanation, evidence, file paths, or output for this item.

output.description: Optional. File path or inline content produced by this item.
